summary: Completed P0 responsive layout and image loading tests. All responsive fixes working correctly on desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px). Carousel images load from Unsplash, trust indicators stack vertically on mobile, CTA buttons stack on mobile, carousel arrows hidden on mobile. One data issue found: About page profile image points to dead preview URL in database.

data_issues.issue: Profile image not loading - database contains dead preview URL
data_issues.fix_needed: Update About page image in admin panel with valid Cloudinary or Unsplash URL

passed_tests: Homepage loads on desktop (1920px) - hero carousel, stats, projects grid, CTA section all visible
Homepage loads on mobile (375px) - hero content, stacked trust indicators, stacked buttons, stats cards, projects all visible
Carousel images load from Unsplash (no broken images, first slide shows valid Unsplash image)
Carousel arrows hidden on mobile (sm:flex class working)
Trust indicators stack vertically on mobile (flex-col sm:flex-row working)
CTA buttons stack vertically on mobile (flex-col sm:flex-row working)
Gradient overlay provides text readability on mobile
Projects page responsive on mobile - filter buttons wrap, project cards stack
Projects page responsive on desktop - 3-column grid layout
All project images load from Unsplash (no dead preview URLs)
Blog page responsive on mobile and desktop
Blog images load from Unsplash
About page responsive - stats cards stack on mobile
Mobile hamburger menu works - opens dashboard-style grid navigation
Mobile navigation links work correctly (6 links: Ana Sayfa, Hakkımda, Projeler, Hesaplama, Blog, İletişim)
Footer renders properly on mobile and desktop
Footer contains Gizlilik Politikası and Kullanım Koşulları links
Contact page loads with form and Google Maps
Hesaplama page loads with calculator tools
Admin login works with admin/admin123 credentials
action_items: Update About page profile image in admin panel - current image URL is dead (https://property-admin-52.preview.emergentagent.com/api/upload/files/...)
critical_code_review_comments: resolveImageUrl utility correctly filters dead preview URLs but returns null - About.jsx should handle null image with fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 responsive fixes verified working. All carousel images, project images, blog images load from Unsplash. Mobile layout responsive with stacked elements. One data issue: About page profile image in database points to dead preview URL - needs admin panel update. imageUrl.js utility correctly filters dead URLs but returns null.

desktop_1920px.homepage_hero: ✓ Carousel with Unsplash images, navigation arrows visible, trust indicators in row
desktop_1920px.contact_page: ✓ Form + Google Maps side by side

mobile_375px.homepage_hero: ✓ Carousel arrows hidden, trust indicators stacked, CTA buttons stacked
mobile_375px.about_page: ✓ Image + content stacked (image broken - data issue)
